import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ line: String) -> List<Int>
  mut tokens: List<Int> = []
  mut buf = ""
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10
        if not string.is_empty(buf)
          match string.parse_int(buf)
          when Some(v)
            tokens = list.push(tokens, v)
          when None
            ()
          end
          buf = ""
        end
      else
        buf = "#{buf}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not string.is_empty(buf)
    match string.parse_int(buf)
    when Some(v)
      tokens = list.push(tokens, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  tokens
end

fn bsearch(_ xs: List<Int>, _ t: Int) -> Option<Int>
  mut lo = 0
  mut hi = xs.len() - 1
  while lo <= hi
    let mid = (lo + hi) / 2
    match xs.get(mid)
    when Some(v)
      if v == t
        return Some(mid)
      else if v < t
        lo = mid + 1
      else
        hi = mid - 1
      end
    when None
      return None
    end
  end
  None
end

fn read_or_empty() -> String
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line1 = read_or_empty()
  let line2 = read_or_empty()
  let xs = parse_ints(line1)
  match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
  when Some(t)
    match bsearch(xs, t)
    when Some(i)
      println("index=#{i}")
    when None
      println("not_found")
    end
  when None
    println("not_found")
  end
end
